Title: User Registration
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Valid password: Password123!
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the registration process.
2. User provides a valid email and password.
3. User Registration service receives the registration request.
4. User Registration service validates the provided credentials.
5. User Registration service saves the user data to the Users Database.
Expected Result:
- User registration is successful.
- User data is saved in the Users Database.

Title: Invalid Email Registration
Test Data:
- Invalid email: testexample.com
- Valid password: Password123!
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the registration process.
2. User provides an invalid email and a valid password.
3. User Registration service receives the registration request.
4. User Registration service detects the invalid email format.
5. User Registration service rejects the registration request.
Expected Result:
- User registration fails due to invalid email format.
- No user data is saved in the Users Database.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User is registered and logged out.
Test Data:
- Valid username: testuser
- Valid password: Password123!
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the login process.
2. User provides a valid username and password.
3. System verifies the provided credentials against stored data.
4. System confirms the login credentials are correct.
5. System logs the user in.
Expected Result:
- User login is successful.
- User is logged into the system.

Title: Incorrect Password Login
Preconditions: User is registered and logged out.
Test Data:
- Valid username: testuser
- Invalid password: wrongpassword
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the login process.
2. User provides a valid username and an incorrect password.
3. System verifies the provided credentials against stored data.
4. System detects the incorrect password.
5. System denies the login attempt.
Expected Result:
- User login fails due to incorrect password.
- User remains logged out.

Title: Create Trip
Test Data:
- Name: Summer Vacation
- Date: 2023-07-01
- Category: Leisure
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user creates a new trip.
2. User provides trip details including name, date, and category.
3. System validates the provided trip details.
4. System creates a new trip entry.
Expected Result:
- Trip creation is successful.
- New trip is added to the user's list of trips.

Title: Delete Trip
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user selects a trip to delete.
2. User confirms the deletion of the selected trip.
3. System deletes the specified trip entry.
Expected Result:
- Trip deletion is successful.
- Selected trip is removed from the user's list of trips.

Title: Create Daily Plan
Preconditions: User is logged in, has a trip and plan.
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user associates a daily plan with a specific plan.
2. User provides daily plan details including user ID, plan ID, and date.
3. System validates the provided daily plan details.
4. System creates a new daily plan entry.
Expected Result:
- Daily plan creation is successful.
- New daily plan is associated with the specified plan.

Title: Delete Daily Plan
Preconditions: User has created a daily plan.
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user selects a daily plan to delete.
2. User confirms the deletion of the selected daily plan.
3. System deletes the specified daily plan entry.
Expected Result:
- Daily plan deletion is successful.
- Selected daily plan is removed from the user's list of daily plans.

Title: Get Profile
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user requests their profile information.
2. System retrieves the user's profile from the Users Database.
3. System returns the user's profile information.
Expected Result:
- Profile retrieval is successful.
- User receives their profile information.

Title: Update Profile
Test Data:
- User ID: 1
- New Name: John Doe
- New Email: john.doe@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user updates their profile information.
2. User provides updated name and email.
3. System validates the updated profile information.
4. System updates the user's profile in the Users Database.
Expected Result:
- Profile update is successful.
- User's profile information is updated in the Users Database.

Title: Add User
Test Steps:
1. System receives a request to add a new user.
2. System validates the provided username and password.
3. System adds the new user to the Users Database.
Expected Result:
- User addition is successful.
- New user is added to the Users Database.

Title: Delete User
Preconditions: User exists in the Users Database.
Test Steps:
1. System receives a request to delete a user.
2. System validates the user ID.
3. System deletes the specified user from the Users Database.
Expected Result:
- User deletion is successful.
- Specified user is removed from the Users Database.

Title: Invalid User Deletion
Preconditions: User exists in the Users Database.
Test Steps:
1. System receives a request to delete a user.
2. System validates the user ID.
3. System detects the invalid user ID.
4. System rejects the deletion request.
Expected Result:
- User deletion fails due to invalid user ID.
- No changes are made to the Users Database.

Title: User Logout
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user initiates the logout process.
2. System logs the user out.
Expected Result:
- User logout is successful.
- User is logged out of the system.
